final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine UI mockup aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a full-width header bar, a three-column hero section (left copy column / center model / right product column), and a bottom benefit-card row; exact spacing and proportions are yours
Subject: must include all UI elements across 4 zones:

  Header:
    - Logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY" (top-left)
    - 5 navigation links: "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
    - CTA button: "今すぐ試す"

  Hero left column:
    - Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
    - Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
    - 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
    - 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
    - 2 CTA buttons: "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
    - Trust badge strip: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"

  Hero center:
    - Young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum

  Hero right column:
    - 2 product items: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box
    - 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"

  Bottom section:
    - 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"

Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy background with floral accents using purple flowers — exact placement and density are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused, bright atmosphere — exact light source treatment is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple flower accents and gold stat-card details
Materials/textures: needs a light, smooth UI surface feel — exact card sheen and shadow depth are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Japanese and English text exactly as listed in Subject above, preserving original script
Constraints: must preserve all UI element counts (5 nav links, 3 badges, 3 bullets, 2 CTAs, 3 stat cards, 3 benefit cards); layout must read as a realistic browser-width landing page mockup
Avoid:
